arts.ttl: Projected Line-up: How Milan Could Shape Up Against Empoli
arts.sum: There's a new energy at the San Siro after Milan completed several high-profile winter signings to back new manager Sergio Conceicao. Now buoyed by a 3-1 thumping of Roma in the Coppa Italia quarter-finals, last season's Serie A runners-up head to Stadio Carlo Castellani to meet Empoli. The post Projected Line-up: How Milan Could Shape Up Against Empoli appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
